README.md:157-236
157| ### Checkpoints
158| 
159| A **checkpoint** is a snapshot within a session that you can rewind to—a "save point" in your work.
160| 
161| Checkpoints are created when you or the agent make a git commit. **Checkpoint IDs** are 12-character hex strings (e.g., `a3b2c4d5e6f7`).
162| 
163| ### How It Works
164|
